summary: Iteration 149: Full E2E testing of Contraction Timer feature. All backend APIs (27/27 tests passed) and frontend UI verified working correctly.

backend_api_tests.details: All contraction timer APIs working: session management, contraction timing (start/stop), manual add, update, delete, 5-1-1 pattern detection, summary export, team sharing endpoints

timer_tab_visibility.details: Timer tab visible in Mom's bottom navigation between Birth Plan and My Team tabs

empty_state_ui.details: Shows 'Ready to Time Contractions?' with 'Start Timing Session' button when no active session

start_session_modal.details: Modal shows sharing options (Share with my Doula/Midwife) with Not Now and Start Session buttons

active_session_ui.details: Stats strip shows Avg Duration, Avg Interval, Count. Timer circle shows elapsed time. Start/Stop Contraction button toggles correctly

intensity_picker.details: Modal appears after stopping contraction with Mild/Moderate/Strong options and Skip button

history_modal.details: Shows list of contractions with time, duration, interval and delete button

manual_add_modal.details: Form with Start Time (HH:MM), Duration (seconds), Intensity selection, Notes field and Add Contraction button

511_status_indicator.details: Shows 'Early Labor' pattern status in indicator bar

bottom_actions.details: History, Add Manual, Share, End buttons all visible and functional

seed_data_creation: Created test session token for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contraction Timer feature fully implemented and tested. All 13 backend API endpoints working correctly. Frontend Timer tab visible in Mom's navigation. Session management, contraction timing, intensity tracking, history, manual add, 5-1-1 pattern detection, and export functionality all verified. Team sharing endpoints for Doula/Midwife dashboard also working.
